violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, rice was placed hot in a container greater than four inches deep. Staff placed in metal hotel pan to facilitate cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the facility. Inspector and PIC discussed storage options. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the dolly under the stand mixer. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the stand mixer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Mixer cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The menu board is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The hand wash sinks are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
A leak was observed at the 3-bay sink. Plumbers were on-site at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
